construct_verdict_reason: Most items measure subjective economic wellbeing and agency as described, but p10 measures objective social class identification rather than subjective economic control or life satisfaction.

items.reason: Directly measures perceived resilience and personal strength in facing life adversities, a core component of subjective agency.
Directly measures perceived influence of national economic conditions on personal welfare, a key element of the construct.
Directly measures perceived personal agency and control over future economic outcomes.
Measures overall life satisfaction, which is explicitly included in the construct description as part of subjective economic wellbeing.

Measures objective social class self-identification rather than subjective economic control, resilience, or life satisfaction; it is a demographic proxy correlated with but semantically distinct from the construct.
